message:
fix(e2e): gate WIP host_resilience_e2e behind feature flag

The host_resilience_e2e.rs test file uses APIs that don't exist yet
(ConnectorHealth PartialEq, E2eLogger::log/to_jsonl, runtime::spawn).
Gate behind __host_resilience_wip feature to unblock workspace clippy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -90,6 +90,7 @@ zapier = []
 redis = []
 postgresql = []
 whisper = []
+__host_resilience_wip = []
 
 [dependencies]
 fcp-core = { workspace = true }
